title: ottleya mollis
intro: Ottleya mollis, also known as desert broom or broomstick, is a type of shrubby plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ottleya mollis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its leaves can be used in herbal preparations, such as salves and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
